sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22846" key="griphi\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γρῑπ-ηὶς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, art <sense id="n22846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of fishing,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.223</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
